title: yayamlls workspace configuration
description: Schema for .yayamlls.yaml at the repo root.

schemas.description: Map of schema URL or filesystem path to one or more glob patterns. The first pattern that matches a document's path wins.

catalog.description: Whether to consult the JSON Schema Store catalog when other resolution steps don't match. Default: true.

catalogUrl.description: Override the catalog endpoint. Empty means use https://www.schemastore.org/api/json/catalog.json.

kubernetes.description: Kubernetes apiVersion+kind schema auto-detect and Flux rendering.

enabled.description: Enable Kubernetes support. Default: true; set false to run as a generic YAML language server.

schemaUrl.description: URL template for Kubernetes schema lookup. Placeholders: {group}, {groupSeg}, {groupFirst}, {groupFirstSeg}, {kind}, {kindLower}, {version}, {versionLower}.

renderers.description: Per-renderer configuration. A key names a built-in renderer (e.g. 'flate') to tune it, or declares a new subprocess renderer that shells out to a command. Subprocess renderers require 'match' and 'command'.

enabled.description: Whether this renderer is active. Default: true.

binary.description: flate: override the flate executable name or path.

path.description: flate: build root; relative paths anchor at the workspace root.

match.description: Subprocess renderer: which documents this handles.

group.description: API group to match on a group boundary, e.g. 'kustomize.toolkit.fluxcd.io'. Omit for the core group.

command.description: Subprocess renderer: argv to run. Placeholders: {dir} (document's directory), {file} (document path), {name} (metadata.name). stdout is parsed as multi-document YAML.

fluxSubstitutions.description: Suppress pattern-mismatch errors on values containing Flux PostBuild substitution tokens (${VAR}). Default: false.

customTags.description: YAML tags whose values an external tool resolves (e.g. '!Ref', '!vault'). Nodes carrying one skip schema validation. An optional kind hint after the tag ('!Sub sequence') is ignored for matching.
